h1.visual_description: Not present on this sample page; typically would be larger, bold, and at the start of a major section.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this sample page.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table caption, positioned below the table content.
In-text parenthetical citation following (Author, Year) format.
Table row labels (Port names) and primary headers, styled in bold uppercase.
Acronyms for agencies or technical terms (e.g., PPA, SBMA, IAS).

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Not observed; default to LaTeX-style $...$ for inline and $$...$$ for block math.
markdown_grammar.table_style: html (required to represent merged header cells, such as 'SHIPCALLS' spanning 'Foreign' and 'Domestic')

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers located at the bottom right corner (e.g., '10').
